$comment: Test fixture for the manifest→AG-018-checker contract (tests/forge-anti-generic-s1-density.test.ts). This is a preserved copy of the asset manifest that used to live at web/src/assets/asset-manifest.json for the council-approved dashboard-empty-state illustration; the web/ Forge dashboard test harness that owned that asset was removed. Kept here so the end-to-end 'manifest marks an asset QA-passed, which exempts the marked snapshot' contract stays proven without depending on any GUI asset.

notes: Council forgeEmptyStateIllustration approved_with_conditions; candidate tight-2 (tight ≤6px corners per C4).
Deterministic runAssetQA pass (QA-001/002/003/007); content vetted by the design+a11y council seats.
